{{- /* Sidebar built entirely from .Site.Pages — no hardcoded page list. Every Markdown doc page (excluding the home page) is listed, grouped by section via its URL prefix. */ -}}
    {{- range sortBy (where .Site.Pages "type" "md") "url"}} {{- if ne .URL "/index/"}}
  • {{.Envelope.title}}
    • {{- end}} {{- end}}
